caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hooded sweatshirt with "BOSS" written in gold lettering on the chest, a gold chain, and a gold watch. He wears blue over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. In the background, a white banner displays a logo featuring stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE," while a blue screen reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT" sits on the table to his right. A small logo with a microphone icon is visible in the bottom left corner. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left with a serious expression, while the scene remains static with no significant movement or changes in the environment.
